svg.style: background: #ffffff; background-color: light-dark(#ffffff, var(--ge-dark-color, #121212)); color-scheme: light dark;
svg.content: <mxfile host="app.diagrams.net" agent="Claude" scale="1" border="0"> <diagram name="Celery task queue flow" id="celery-flow"> <mxGraphModel dx="1699" dy="867" grid="1" gridSize="10" guides="1" tooltips="1" connect="1" arrows="1" fold="1" page="1" pageScale="1" pageWidth="900" pageHeight="700" math="0" shadow="0"> <root> <mxCell id="0" /> <mxCell id="1" parent="0" /> <mxCell id="s4Ptj54KFtlqkUlrTUpr-2" edge="1" parent="1" source="user1" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;orthogonalLoop=1;jettySize=auto;html=1;" target="server1"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="user1" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#F1EFE8;strokeColor=#5F5E5A;fontColor=#2C2C2A;fontSize=13;align=center;verticalAlign=middle;arcSize=15;" value="<b>User / UI</b><br><font style="font-size: 11px" color="#5F5E5A">Clicks "process"</font>" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="64" width="160" x="60" y="80" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="s4Ptj54KFtlqkUlrTUpr-1" edge="1" parent="1" source="server1" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;orthogonalLoop=1;jettySize=auto;html=1;entryX=0.5;entryY=1;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;" target="user1"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"> <Array as="points"> <mxPoint x="450" y="164" /> <mxPoint x="140" y="164" /> </Array> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="s4Ptj54KFtlqkUlrTUpr-3" edge="1" parent="1" source="server1" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;orthogonalLoop=1;jettySize=auto;html=1;entryX=0;entryY=0.5;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;" target="broker"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="server1" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#E6F1FB;strokeColor=#185FA5;fontColor=#0C447C;fontSize=13;align=center;verticalAlign=middle;arcSize=15;" value="<b>Web server</b><br><font style="font-size: 11px" color="#185FA5">Creates Celery task</font>" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="64" width="160" x="370" y="80" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="broker" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#EEEDFE;strokeColor=#534AB7;fontColor=#3C3489;fontSize=13;align=center;verticalAlign=middle;arcSize=15;" value="<b>Broker (Redis)</b><br><font style="font-size: 11px" color="#534AB7">Queues the task</font>" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="64" width="160" x="680" y="80" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e1label" parent="1" style="text;html=1;align=center;fontSize=11;fontColor=#5F5E5A;" value="request" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="20" width="100" x="245" y="80" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e2label" parent="1" style="text;html=1;align=center;fontSize=11;fontColor=#5F5E5A;" value="enqueue" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="20" width="100" x="555" y="80" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e3label" parent="1" style="text;html=1;align=center;fontSize=11;fontColor=#5F5E5A;" value="returns task ID instantly" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="20" width="160" x="215" y="170" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="worker" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#E1F5EE;strokeColor=#0F6E56;fontColor=#085041;fontSize=13;align=center;verticalAlign=middle;arcSize=15;" value="<b>Celery worker</b><br><font style="font-size: 11px" color="#0F6E56">Executes the task</font>" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="64" width="160" x="680" y="300" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e4" edge="1" parent="1" source="broker" style="endArrow=classic;html=1;rounded=0;strokeColor=#444441;strokeWidth=1.5;fontSize=11;fontColor=#5F5E5A;exitX=0.5;exitY=1;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;entryX=0.5;entryY=0;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;" target="worker"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e4label" parent="1" style="text;html=1;align=center;fontSize=11;fontColor=#5F5E5A;" value="picks up" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="20" width="80" x="750" y="212" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="user2" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#F1EFE8;strokeColor=#5F5E5A;fontColor=#2C2C2A;fontSize=13;align=center;verticalAlign=middle;arcSize=15;" value="<b>User / UI</b><br><font style="font-size: 11px" color="#5F5E5A">Polls with task ID</font>" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="64" width="160" x="60" y="300" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="server2" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#E6F1FB;strokeColor=#185FA5;fontColor=#0C447C;fontSize=13;align=center;verticalAlign=middle;arcSize=15;" value="<b>Web server</b><br><font style="font-size: 11px" color="#185FA5">Reads task status</font>" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="64" width="160" x="370" y="300" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e5" edge="1" parent="1" source="user2" style="endArrow=classic;html=1;rounded=0;strokeColor=#444441;strokeWidth=1.5;fontSize=11;fontColor=#5F5E5A;exitX=1;exitY=0.35;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;entryX=0;entryY=0.35;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;" target="server2"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e5label" parent="1" style="text;html=1;align=center;fontSize=11;fontColor=#5F5E5A;" value="GET /status" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="20" width="100" x="245" y="290" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e6" edge="1" parent="1" source="server2" style="endArrow=classic;html=1;rounded=0;strokeColor=#444441;strokeWidth=1.5;fontSize=11;fontColor=#5F5E5A;exitX=0;exitY=0.65;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;entryX=1;entryY=0.65;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;" target="user2"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e6label" parent="1" style="text;html=1;align=center;fontSize=11;fontColor=#5F5E5A;" value="pending / done" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="20" width="100" x="245" y="350" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e7" edge="1" parent="1" source="worker" style="endArrow=classic;html=1;rounded=0;strokeColor=#444441;strokeWidth=1.5;fontSize=11;fontColor=#5F5E5A;exitX=0;exitY=0.5;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;entryX=1;entryY=0.5;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;" target="server2"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e7label" parent="1" style="text;html=1;align=center;fontSize=11;fontColor=#5F5E5A;" value="writes result" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="20" width="100" x="555" y="300" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> </root> </mxGraphModel> </diagram> </mxfile>
